subcodes.first_line: O beloved! His honour, thy father, hath arrived in the place of exile and tribulation of the wanderers, and hath attained unto the blessing of visiting the Sacred Shrine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب جناب ابوی در محل غربت و کربت آوارگان وارد و بزیارت بقعه مبارکه فائز و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
